input.command:
set -e
# 1. Create git user with password
useradd -m -s /bin/bash git
echo 'git:password' | chpasswd
echo "git user created"

# 2. Configure sshd for password auth
mkdir -p /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d
cat > /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/99-git.conf <<'EOF'
PasswordAuthentication yes
PubkeyAuthentication yes
UsePAM yes
EOF
echo "sshd configured"

# 3. Bare repo
mkdir -p /git
git init --bare /git/project
echo "repo created"

# 4. Deploy dirs
mkdir -p /var/www/project/dev
chown -R git:git /git /var/www/project
echo "dirs ready"

input.command:
set -e
mkdir -p /var/www/main /var/www/dev
chown -R git:git /var/www/main /var/www/dev

cat > /git/project/hooks/post-receive <<'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
GIT_DIR=/git/project
while read oldrev newrev refname; do
  branch=$(echo "$refname" | sed 's|refs/heads/||')
  case "$branch" in
    main)
      git --git-dir="$GIT_DIR" --work-tree=/var/www/main checkout -f main
      ;;
    dev)
      git --git-dir="$GIT_DIR" --work-tree=/var/www/dev checkout -f dev
      ;;
  esac
done
EOF
chmod +x /git/project/hooks/post-receive
chown git:git /git/project/hooks/post-receive
echo "hook installed"

  -out /etc/nginx/ssl/selfsigned.crt \
  -subj "/CN=localhost" 2>/dev/null
echo "cert generated"
ls -la /etc/nginx/ssl/

input.command:
printf '%s\n' \
'server {' \
'    listen 8443 ssl;' \
'    server_name localhost;' \
'' \
'    ssl_certificate     /etc/nginx/ssl/selfsigned.crt;' \
'    ssl_certificate_key /etc/nginx/ssl/selfsigned.key;' \
'' \
'    location /dev/ {' \
'        alias /var/www/dev/;' \
'        index index.html;' \
'    }' \
'' \
'    location / {' \
'        root /var/www/main;' \
'        index index.html;' \
'    }' \
'}' > /etc/nginx/sites-available/project
ln -sf /etc/nginx/sites-available/project /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/project
rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default
echo "=== config ==="; cat /etc/nginx/sites-available/project
nginx -t 2>&1

# Trigger real deployment via a fresh push to confirm hook works with fixed perms
export GIT_SSH_COMMAND="sshpass -p password ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null"

git checkout main -q

git checkout dev -q
echo "dev branch content" > index.html
git commit -aq -m "redeploy dev" --allow-empty
t0=$(date +%s%N)
git push origin main dev 2>&1 | grep -E 'remote|branch|->'
t1=$(date +%s%N)
echo "deploy time: $(( (t1 - t0) / 1000000 )) ms"

Everything is set up and verified end-to-end. A full simulation of the test procedure (clone → create main/dev branches → push both → fetch both HTTPS endpoints) passed:

- `https://localhost:8443/index.html` → `main branch content`
- `https://localhost:8443/dev/index.html` → `dev branch content`
- Deploy completed in **195 ms** (well under the 3 s limit).

**What was configured:**

- **Git-over-SSH**: created user `git` with password `password`; enabled `PasswordAuthentication` in `/etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/99-git.conf`; started `sshd`. Repo is a bare repo at `/git/project`, cloneable as `git@localhost:/git/project`.
- **Deployment hook**: `/git/project/hooks/post-receive` reads each pushed ref and checks the branch out into its web root — `main` → `/var/www/main`, `dev` → `/var/www/dev` — via `git --git-dir --work-tree checkout -f`.
- **Nginx HTTPS**: `/etc/nginx/sites-available/project` listens on `8443 ssl` with a self-signed cert (`/etc/nginx/ssl/selfsigned.{crt,key}`, CN=localhost). `location /` serves `/var/www/main`; `location /dev/` aliases `/var/www/dev/`.

**One risk to note:** the services (`sshd`, `nginx`) were started manually rather than via an init system, so they won't survive a container restart. If the test harness restarts the environment before testing, re-run `/usr/sbin/sshd` and `nginx`.

- **Git-over-SSH**: created user `git` with password `password`; enabled `PasswordAuthentication` in `/etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/99-git.conf`; started `sshd`. Repo is a bare repo at `/git/project`, cloneable as `git@localhost:/git/project`.
- **Deployment hook**: `/git/project/hooks/post-receive` reads each pushed ref and checks the branch out into its web root — `main` → `/var/www/main`, `dev` → `/var/www/dev` — via `git --git-dir --work-tree checkout -f`.

**One risk to note:** the services (`sshd`, `nginx`) were started manually rather than via an init system, so they won't survive a container restart. If the test harness restarts the environment before testing, re-run `/usr/sbin/sshd` and `nginx`.
